title: Praise You
album: You've Come a Long Way Baby
why_this_song: Praise You by Fatboy Slim (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I have to praise you like I should
We've come a long, long way together
Through the hard times and the good
I have to celebrate you, baby
I have to praise you like I should

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "praise" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "praise" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "long" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "long" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: We've come a long, long way together
I have to praise you like I should

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Praise You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Praise You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Fatboy Slim one question about "Praise You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Fatboy Slim sobre "Praise You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Praise You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Praise You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
